SEARCH
Package org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer

Class TransferServlet

java.lang.Object
javax.servlet.GenericServlet
javax.servlet.sip.SipServlet
org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferServlet
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, EventListener, Servlet, ServletConfig, ServletContextListener, SipApplicationSessionListener, SipServletListener, SipSessionListener, TimerListener, B2buaListener, TransferListener
@WebListener public class TransferServlet extends B2buaServlet implements TransferListener, SipApplicationSessionListener, SipSessionListener
This class implements an example B2BUA with transfer capabilities.
See Also:

    This method is called to indicate that the transfer target did not accept the call.

    This method is invoked by one of the Transfer callflows to indicate an INVITE is being sent to the transfer target.

      ServletException
      IOException

    • transferInitiated

      public void transferInitiated(SipServletRequest request) throws ServletException, IOException
      Description copied from interface: TransferListener
      This method is invoked by one of the Transfer callflows to indicate an INVITE is being sent to the transfer target. You may modify the intended destination of the INVITE by modifying the request URI or the 'To' header. To modify the 'To' header, use a syntax similar to: request.getAddressHeader("To").setURI(sipFactory.createURI("sip:target2@vorpal.net"));
      Specified by:
      transferInitiated in interface TransferListener
      Parameters:
      request -
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • transferCompleted

      public void transferCompleted(SipServletResponse response) throws ServletException, IOException
      Description copied from interface: TransferListener
      This method is called after the transfer target has accepted the call.
      Specified by:
      transferCompleted in interface TransferListener
      Parameters:
      response - a modifiable successful response
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • transferDeclined

      public void transferDeclined(SipServletResponse response) throws ServletException, IOException
      Description copied from interface: TransferListener
      This method is called to indicate that the transfer target did not accept the call.
      Specified by:
      transferDeclined in interface TransferListener
      Parameters:
      response - a non-modifiable error response
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • transferAbandoned

      public void transferAbandoned(SipServletRequest request) throws ServletException, IOException
      Description copied from interface: TransferListener
      This method is called to indicate that the transferee has hung up during the transfer process. The request may be either a BYE or CANCEL depending upon the callflow.
      Specified by:
      transferAbandoned in interface TransferListener
      Parameters:
      request - either a cancel or bye request
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException
